title: Luxury Volumizing Wave Blowout
details: Transformed dry, lifeless hair into voluminous, bouncy, gold-glowing waves with deep hydration therapy.

title: Seamless Champagne Balayage
details: Fixed brassy, uneven tones with a hand-painted champagne gold balayage and color locking wash.

title: Organic Hair Botox Restoration
details: Reversed extensive heat damage and frizz, restoring 100% shine and silky texture without formaldehyde.

title: Royal Kerala Bridal Glow
details: Prepped skin with deep hydration followed by an HD sweat-proof airbrush makeup base and traditional jasmine styling.

title: Executive Beard & Hair Fade
details: Cleaned up overgrown, unkempt beard into a sharp contoured beard fade with hot steam oil treatment.
